description: Fivetran-generated unique hash ID. Primary key, used for deduplication.
Date of the post/share statistic record (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension.
Engagement rate for the day (total interactions / impressions). Multiply by 100 to express as percentage.
Unique members who saw organization posts this day (de-duplicated reach).
Times organization posts were reshared by other members this day.
Post mentions originating from reshares this day.
Total clicks on organization posts (links, images, company name) this day.
Total likes and reactions on organization posts this day.
Total post impressions this day (includes repeat views; higher than unique_impressions_count).
Total comments received on organization posts this day.
Post mentions originating from comments this day.
LinkedIn organization URN identifying the company page (e.g. urn:li:organization:65015275).
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
